title: celloexpress 25mm Royal Blue 175 Velvet Ribbon - High Density Single Faced Gift Wrap Bow Making (20m)
features: PACKAGE CONTAINS: 20m (2000cm) of 25mm Royal Blue Velvet Ribbon
ELEGANT GIFT WRAP: Add a touch of elegance to your gift wrapping and crafting projects with this high density single-sided velvet ribbon
SOFT AND SMOOTH: Available in both 16mm and 25mm widths, crafted from top-quality velvet material it feels soft and smooth to the touch

PERFECT FOR BOWS AND CRAFTING: This luxurious ribbon is perfect for creating beautiful bows and embellishments for any occasion, whether you're wrapping a gift or designing a unique piece of crafting, it is sure to impress and make a statement

THE RANGE: This 25mm velvet ribbon is available in 19 colours: baby pink, black, bright brown, chestnut brown, cream, dark red, duck egg blue, dusky pink, garnet red, gold, green, grey, latte brown, light grey, navy blue, olive green, purple, red, royal blue and white. We also stock our velvet ribbon in a 16mm width
